translations: And for Allah (are) the names  the most beautiful
so invoke Him by them And leave
His names They will be recompensed for what
puzzle.hint: This verse invites believers to call upon Allah using His most beautiful names (Al-Asma' al-Husna), while warning against those who distort their meaning.
puzzle.arabic: وَلِلَّهِ ٱلْأَسْمَآءُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ فَٱدْعُوهُ بِهَا ۖ وَذَرُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ يُلْحِدُونَ فِىٓ أَسْمَـٰٓئِهِۦ ۚ سَيُجْزَوْنَ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
puzzle.verseEn: And to Allāh belong the best names, so invoke Him by them. And leave [the company of] those who practice deviation concerning His names. They will be recompensed for what they have been doing.
